---
title: "Learning Tracks"
---

A **track** is a curated sequence of resource pages that builds up knowledge or skill on a topic in a deliberate order. Unlike the [Resource Library](../resources/index.qmd), which is organized for browsing, tracks are organized for learning — each page in a track builds on the ones before it.

Tracks are written as general learning paths, not course companions. They are useful if you want to develop competence in an area rather than look up a single reference.

---

## Available tracks

*Tracks will appear here as they are added. Check back soon.*

- [Getting Started with R](getting-started-with-r.qmd) *(skeleton — in progress)*
